mqtt_host.name: MQTT Broker IP
mqtt_host.description: The IP address of your MQTT server.

mqtt_user.name: MQTT Username
mqtt_user.description: Username used to authenticate with your MQTT broker.

mqtt_password.name: MQTT Password
mqtt_password.description: Password used to authenticate with your MQTT broker.

acr_access_key.name: ACRCloud Access Key
acr_access_key.description: Your optional ACRCloud API project access key.

acr_access_secret.name: ACRCloud Access Secret
acr_access_secret.description: Your optional ACRCloud API project secret key.

turntable_entity.name: Turntable Switch Entity
turntable_entity.description: The switch or smart plug that monitors the physical turntable power state.

silence_gap_seconds.name: Silence Gap (Seconds)
silence_gap_seconds.description: The duration of silence required to trigger the next track detection loop.

idle_image_url.name: Idle Artwork URL
idle_image_url.description: A web URL or local path to the image displayed when the turntable is turned off.

auto_calibrate.name: Auto Calibrate
auto_calibrate.description: Sample preamp and ambient line noise for 5 seconds upon spin-up to automatically adjust volume thresholds.

lastfm_enabled.name: Enable Last.fm Scrobbling
lastfm_enabled.description: Toggle to automatically push identified tracks to your Last.fm profile history.

lastfm_api_secret.name: Last.fm Shared Secret
lastfm_api_secret.description: Your Last.fm API application shared secret.
